arch.aes.desc: AES (Advanced Encryption Standard) qo' naQ lo'bogh ta', ngaQ, 'ej QI' peH mIw 'oH. 256 ngaSruq 'ab bit — 2256 ngaSruq tu'lu', HoS ngoH laHbe'. GCM (Galois/Counter Mode) 'ay'moH peH chel — peH neH Qapbe', ngoq choHlu'pu''a' je tu'.
arch.aes.title: nuq 'oH AES-256-GCM'e'?

arch.server.callout: yaHwI' naQ QIHlu'chugh — De'Daq naQ, ngoq pol Hoch, ghItlh Hoch — De'wI' ghItlh ngeHlu'bogh pagh 'ang. ngaSruq Hutlhchugh ngoq 'ej mIw pagh pIm.

arch.server_never.desc:
peH ngaSruq — De'wI'Daq ratlh, URL pergh lo'lu'
De'wI' ghItlh pong — yaHwI' ngeHbe'lu'
De'wI' ghItlh Segh — ngoq Segh polbe'lu'
ngoq poSmoH — ngoq peH neH ngeHlu'
IP HablI' teH — polpa' Hash lo'lu'
arch.server_never.title: yaHwI' leghbe'
arch.server_stores.desc:
ngeH pong — mIw 12 Degh
peH byte — mIw De' pIm tu'laHbe'
IP Hash — SHA-256 IP + jaj tIq choH
poH Degh — ghorgh ngeH chenmoHlu'
De'wI' ghItlh 'ab — ngoq peH blob 'ab (byte)
arch.server_stores.title: yaHwI' pol
arch.stack.storage.purpose: choHlaHbogh bIng: qawHaq, DIr, pagh S3
arch.stack.subtitle: patlh Hoch wIvlu' — nap, Hung, 'ej pagh poQ qach.
arch.stack.testing.purpose: mock pagh, patch pagh, teH chenmoH
arch.stack.title: De'wI' laH pat
arch.step1.desc: De'wI' ghItlh DawIvDI', De'wI'lIj mIw 256-bit AES ngaSruq chenmoH Web Crypto API (crypto.subtle.generateKey) lo'lu'. jan De'wI' Hung mIw mI' lo'. ngaSruq De'wI'lIj qawHaqDaq neH tu'lu'.
arch.step1.title: ngaSruq chenmoH
arch.step2.desc: 12-byte IV (Initialisation Vector) mIw chenmoHlu' (crypto.getRandomValues). De'wI' ghItlh rap cha'logh peHchugh ngoq pIm chenmoH IV. IV pegh 'oHbe' — ngoq peH yor chellu' 'ej ngoq tlhej ngeHlu'.
arch.step2.title: IV chenmoH
arch.step3.desc: De'wI'Daq De'wI' ghItlh peHlu' crypto.subtle.encrypt lo'lu' AES-GCM mIw, ngaSruq chenmoHlu'bogh, 'ej IV. ngoq peH + 128-bit 'ay'moH per 'oH. 'ay'moH per GCM naQ lay' 'oH — ngoq peH wa' bit choHlu'chugh, peghHa' luj.
arch.step3.title: peH
arch.step4.desc: ngoq peH (IV + ngoq peH + 'ay'moH per) neH yaHwI' ngeHlu'. mIw byte blob Hev yaHwI'. ngeH pong (mIw 12 Degh) nob 'ej ngoq peH pol. De'wI' ghItlh pong pagh, ngoq Segh pagh, ngaSruq pagh — peH byte neH.
arch.step4.title: yIngeH
arch.step5.desc: ngeHwI' laj rarwI' Suq. URL pergh (# tlhop) retlhDaq ngaSruq peghHa'wI' lanlu'. URL pergh yaHwI' ngeHbe' De'wI' — RFC 3986 mab 'oH. rarwI' wIv lo' ngeHwI' lI' (QIn, QumpIn, nuv).
arch.step5.title: rarwI' ngeH
arch.step6.desc: HevwI' rarwI' poSmoH. De'wI'chaj yaHwI'vo' peH byte laj, URL pergh ngaSruq tlhap, IV ngoq peH wav, 'ej crypto.subtle.decrypt lo' peghHa'. 'ay'moH per rap Qapbe'chugh (choH tu'lu'), peghHa' luj. yaHwI' peghHa' mIwDaq jeS pagh.
arch.step6.title: peghHa'
arch.symmetric.callout: Sov potlh: ngaSruq nuqDaq chenmoHlu' 'ej nuqDaq jaH DaSeHchugh, rap peH naQ pegh nob. SG/Send De'wI'lIjDaq ngaSruq chenmoH, 'ej yaHwI' SIqbe' ngaSruq.
arch.symmetric.subtitle: SG/Send rap peH lo' — ngaSruq rap peH 'ej peghHa'. nap law' Hoch nap puS 'ej nom law' Hoch nom puS peH Duj 'oH, 'ej QaQ law' Hoch QaQ puS De'wI' ghItlh ngeHmeH — QaQchugh chenmoHlu'.
arch.symmetric.title: rap peH: wa' ngaSruq, cha' mIw

arch.why_symmetric.desc: rap peH wa' ngaSruq lo' peH peghHa' je. pIm peH (RSA rur) ngaSruq cha' lo'. De'wI' ghItlh ngeHmeH, rap peH QaQ: nom, Sov QaQ, 'ej Web Crypto API qo' naQ De'wI' Qap lo' nob.

team.agent.librarian.desc: Sov raQ QaD, ghItlh tetlh, 'ej tu'lu'bogh teH poj — nab 'e' pIm.
team.agent.librarian.title: Librarian
team.agent.qa.desc: Hoch ngoH, laj mab chenmoH, 'ej QaQ Qochbe'. mock pagh, patch pagh — teH chenmoH neH.
team.agent.qa.title: QA
team.agent.sherpa.desc: luch Daq lo'wI' Dev, tagh ghojmoH SeH, 'ej yu' jang. wa'DIch QumwI'.
team.agent.sherpa.title: Sherpa
team.directory.subtitle: yaS Hoch le' patlh ghaj. yIchel — nuq chaH ta', chaH DevwI', 'ej chay' DaQum.
team.directory.title: yaS tetlh
team.explorer.desc: yISam, yInID, wa'DIch chen yIchenmoH. taghwI' moj le'. Explorer ghom laH chu' chenmoH, mIw nID, 'ej Qap chen nob.
team.explorer.title: Explorer ghom
team.hero.lead: 18 IA yaS tay'taHbogh Qap, wa' Human Dev. yaS Hoch patlh le', ngaSruq poS, 'ej QIn pa' ghaj.
team.hero.title: ghom yIqIH
team.keys.subtitle: yaS Hoch ngaSruq poS JSON pat Daj 'oH, ngoq SammeH 'ej pong 'ol.
team.keys.title: jan buSlaHbogh ngaSruq tetlh
team.planner.desc: De'wI' laH choH wo' le'. luch moj Hoch lo'. Town Planner ghom Huch nob De', wo' nab, 'ej Suy Daq lan chenmoH.
team.planner.title: Town Planner ghom
team.teams.subtitle: Wardley Maps mIw lo'lu' wej ghom chenmoHlu', Hoch choH Segh le' buS.
team.teams.title: wej ghom, wa' QuQ
team.villager.desc: yIQan, yIHoS, luch yIchenmoH. le' moj luch. Villager ghom Explorer Qap tlhap 'ej luch Qap chenmoH — laH, legh, 'ej wuqHa'.
team.villager.title: Villager ghom
